summary: Workspaces scheduled for migration are unavailable during cutover window.

updates.details: Check the schedule to see dates for specific workspaces.

summary: Longer wait times due to staff shortage

updates.details: Wait times for SSH access are currently longer than usual. We apologise for any inconvenience.

summary: JASMIN Object Store is currently down.

updates.details: Object storage currently down, producing 503 errors. We are investigating. Apologies for an inconvenience.
The object store is mostly back, but we are still working on the issue.
Object storage is back, but we are still working on making sure it doesn't go down in the same way again.
